segments.notes: Both athletes circling, light hand fighting, Tackett uses shoulder jabs.
segments.stage1_raw: **SEG** | [0:07-0:49] | standing | - | 0.2 | - | 0.2 | grip_fighting,stance_work,feinting | striking_for_grappling,distance_management | Both athletes circling, light hand fighting, Tackett uses shoulder jabs.

segments.notes: Tackett shoots for single leg, Galvao counters with outside leg hook, pulls guard.
segments.stage1_raw: **SEG** | [0:49-1:01] | guard | Galvao | 0.6 | - | 0.8 | tackett_single_leg_attempt,galvao_leg_hook,scramble | takedown_defense,guard_entry,dynamic_transition | Tackett shoots for single leg, Galvao counters with outside leg hook, pulls guard.

detail.setup: Tackett shoots a low single leg from standing.
detail.execution: Tackett drives in for the single leg. Galvao immediately drops to his left hip, hooks Tackett's right leg with his left (outside leg hook), and pushes Tackett's head/shoulder with his right arm to create distance and pull guard, preventing the takedown.
detail.outcome: Tackett's takedown is stuffed, and Galvao successfully enters guard, preventing a top position for Tackett.
detail.coaching: Galvao's immediate, dynamic guard entry and leg hook counter to the single leg was excellent. Tackett could have secured stronger grips before shooting.

segments.stage2_raw: **DETAIL** | [0:49-1:01] | Tackett shoots a low single leg from standing. | Tackett drives in for the single leg. Galvao immediately drops to his left hip, hooks Tackett's right leg with his left (outside leg hook), and pushes Tackett's head/shoulder with his right arm to create distance and pull guard, preventing the takedown. | Tackett's takedown is stuffed, and Galvao successfully enters guard, preventing a top position for Tackett. | Galvao's immediate, dynamic guard entry and leg hook counter to the single leg was excellent. Tackett could have secured stronger grips before shooting.

segments.notes: Galvao maintains flexible guard, uses lapel control. Tackett attempts knee slide pass.
segments.stage1_raw: **SEG** | [1:01-1:29] | guard | Galvao | 0.7 | - | 0.3 | guard_retention,lapel_control,tackett_passing_attempts | flexible_guard,guard_passing_strategy | Galvao maintains flexible guard, uses lapel control. Tackett attempts knee slide pass.

segments.notes: Galvao initiates dynamic sweep, rolls through, attempts back take with body lock.
segments.stage1_raw: **SEG** | [1:29-1:40] | scramble | Galvao | 0.8 | - | 0.9 | galvao_dynamic_sweep,back_take_attempt,tackett_defense | dynamic_sweeps,back_control_entry,scrambling | Galvao initiates dynamic sweep, rolls through, attempts back take with body lock.

detail.setup: Galvao initiates a dynamic sweep from bottom guard, holding double overhook grips on Tackett's legs.
detail.execution: Galvao uses the double overhook grip to elevate Tackett, then dynamically rolls underneath, sweeping Tackett over him. As Tackett lands, Galvao immediately transitions to his back, securing a body lock, demonstrating excellent chain wrestling.
detail.outcome: Galvao successfully sweeps Tackett and immediately transitions to a strong back-take attempt, showing dynamic offensive guard work.
detail.coaching: Galvao's seamless transition from sweep to back take was world-class. Tackett needs to improve his base and posture defense against dynamic sweeps.

segments.stage2_raw: **DETAIL** | [1:29-1:40] | Galvao initiates a dynamic sweep from bottom guard, holding double overhook grips on Tackett's legs. | Galvao uses the double overhook grip to elevate Tackett, then dynamically rolls underneath, sweeping Tackett over him. As Tackett lands, Galvao immediately transitions to his back, securing a body lock, demonstrating excellent chain wrestling. | Galvao successfully sweeps Tackett and immediately transitions to a strong back-take attempt, showing dynamic offensive guard work. | Galvao's seamless transition from sweep to back take was world-class. Tackett needs to improve his base and posture defense against dynamic sweeps.

segments.notes: Galvao secures back control, working for hooks and choke, Tackett defending.

segments.notes: Galvao transitions to mount, looking to isolate an arm.
segments.stage1_raw: **SEG** | [2:00-2:05] | mount | Galvao | 0.9 | - | 0.7 | mount_transition,arm_isolation | mount_control,submission_setup | Galvao transitions to mount, looking to isolate an arm.

detail.setup: Galvao has established mount on Tackett, who is shelled up defensively.
detail.execution: Galvao maintains heavy chest-on-chest pressure in mount. He uses his left arm to pry at Tackett's right arm, attempting to separate it from the body. His hips are low, preventing escape, while his right arm controls Tackett's head/neck area.
detail.outcome: Galvao establishes dominant mount control and begins to set up a submission by isolating an arm, increasing pressure on Tackett.
detail.coaching: Galvao's patient and heavy mount control is excellent. Tackett needs to create frames and hip escape more actively to disrupt the mount.

He uses his left arm to pry at Tackett's right arm, attempting to separate it from the body. His hips are low, preventing escape, while his right arm controls Tackett's head/neck area. | Galvao establishes dominant mount control and begins to set up a submission by isolating an arm, increasing pressure on Tackett. | Galvao's patient and heavy mount control is excellent. Tackett needs to create frames and hip escape more actively to disrupt the mount.

segments.notes: Galvao in side control, referee briefly pauses for wardrobe adjustment.

segments.notes: Tackett attempts to pass, Galvao recovers guard, uses flexible hooks.
segments.stage1_raw: **SEG** | [2:10-2:25] | guard | Galvao | 0.7 | - | 0.5 | guard_recovery,delariva_hooks,spider_hooks | guard_retention,flexible_guard | Tackett attempts to pass, Galvao recovers guard, uses flexible hooks.

detail.setup: Tackett is attempting to pass Galvao's guard. Galvao is on his back.
detail.execution: Galvao actively uses his legs to recover guard. He establishes a deep De La Riva hook with his right leg on Tackett's left thigh, while his left leg hooks Tackett's right armpit/tricep area (spider hook variation). This creates distance and off-balances Tackett.
detail.outcome: Galvao successfully recovers and maintains a dynamic open guard, preventing Tackett from establishing a dominant passing position.
detail.coaching: Galvao's flexible and active guard retention is superb. Tackett needs to be more aggressive in breaking grips and closing distance for passing.

segments.stage2_raw: **DETAIL** | [2:10-2:25] | Tackett is attempting to pass Galvao's guard. Galvao is on his back. | Galvao actively uses his legs to recover guard. Tackett needs to be more aggressive in breaking grips and closing distance for passing.

segments.notes: Galvao sweeps Tackett, secures double overhooks, attempts back take.
segments.stage1_raw: **SEG** | [2:25-2:40] | scramble | Galvao | 0.8 | - | 0.9 | galvao_sweep,double_overhook_take,back_take_attempt | dynamic_sweeps,back_control_entry,scrambling | Galvao sweeps Tackett, secures double overhooks, attempts back take.

detail.setup: Galvao is on bottom, Tackett is standing in his guard. Galvao has double overhook grips on Tackett's legs.
detail.execution: Galvao uses his double overhook grips to elevate and roll Tackett over. As Tackett lands, Galvao immediately transitions to the back, securing a body lock. Tackett defends by turning into Galvao and trying to flatten his hips to the mat, preventing hooks.
detail.outcome: Galvao successfully sweeps Tackett and attempts a back take. Tackett's defense prevents full back control, but Galvao maintains offensive pressure.
detail.coaching: Galvao's dynamic sweeping ability is a major weapon. Tackett's back defense is good, but he needs to avoid getting swept in the first place.

detail.setup: Galvao has established mount on Tackett, who is defending with tight elbows.
detail.execution: Galvao maintains heavy pressure, chest-on-chest, using his weight to flatten Tackett. He actively works to isolate Tackett's left arm, trying to separate it from the body to set up an armlock or other submission. His right arm controls Tackett's head/neck.
detail.outcome: Galvao solidifies mount control and continues to hunt for a submission, keeping Tackett under immense pressure.
detail.coaching: Galvao's patience and methodical submission setup from mount are impressive. Tackett needs to create space and frames to escape or reverse.

segments.notes: Tackett scrambles, escapes mount, ends up on top in Galvao's guard.
segments.stage1_raw: **SEG** | [3:30-3:45] | scramble | Tackett | 0.7 | - | 0.9 | tackett_escape,galvao_back_defense | mount_escape,dynamic_transition | Tackett scrambles, escapes mount, ends up on top in Galvao's guard.

detail.setup: Galvao has Tackett's back with a body lock, but no hooks. Tackett is on his side.
detail.execution: Tackett actively scrambles, turning into Galvao and using his hips to create space. He successfully shakes off the body lock and pushes away, creating enough distance to get back on top in Galvao's guard. Galvao attempts to retain back control but loses it.
detail.outcome: Tackett successfully escapes the dangerous back control position and reverses to a top position in Galvao's guard.
detail.coaching: Tackett's grit and scrambling ability to escape were excellent. Galvao needs to secure hooks faster when attempting a back take to prevent such escapes.

detail.setup: Tackett is on top in Galvao's guard. Galvao has established open guard.
detail.execution: Tackett attempts various guard passes, trying to break Galvao's leg frames and flatten him out. He uses knee slides and pressure passing attempts. Galvao, however, maintains active leg frames, pushing and pulling, and uses hip movement to retain guard and prevent Tackett from gaining side control.
detail.outcome: Tackett is unable to pass Galvao's guard, who effectively retains his guard and prevents any positional advancement.
detail.coaching: Tackett needs to be more decisive and explosive in his passing attempts. Galvao's guard retention is very strong, demonstrating excellent hip mobility and framing.

Galvao's guard retention is very strong, demonstrating excellent hip mobility and framing.

detail.setup: Galvao is on bottom in open guard, Tackett is standing. Galvao initiates a dynamic sweep.
detail.execution: Galvao executes a dynamic sweep, rolling underneath Tackett and coming up to attempt a back take. He secures a body lock, but Tackett is able to defend by turning into Galvao and preventing the hooks from being fully established.
detail.outcome: Galvao successfully sweeps Tackett and attempts a back take. Tackett's defense prevents full back control, but Galvao maintains offensive pressure.
detail.coaching: Galvao's dynamic sweeping ability is a consistent threat. Tackett's back defense is solid, but he needs to avoid getting swept in the first place.

segments.stage1_raw: **SEG** | [5:00-5:15] | scramble | Tackett | 0.7 | - | 0.9 | tackett_escape,galvao_back_defense | mount_escape,dynamic_transition | Tackett scrambles, escapes mount, ends up on top in Galvao's guard.

detail.setup: Galvao in mount. Tackett initiates a mount escape.
detail.execution: Tackett executes a strong bridge and shrimp, creating space and off-balancing Galvao. He then leverages the momentum to reverse the position, ending up on top. His timing and explosive power were key.
detail.outcome: Tackett successfully escapes mount and lands in Galvao's open guard, shifting the positional advantage.
detail.coaching: Excellent mount escape, showing strong fundamental bridging and shrimping. Good awareness to capitalize on the scramble for top position.

detail.outcome: Galvao successfully retains guard, preventing Tackett from advancing to a dominant passing position.
detail.coaching: Tackett needs to vary his passing entries and break posture more effectively. Galvao's guard retention is superb, utilizing frames and hip movement.

detail.execution: Galvao uses a dynamic sweep (possibly technical stand-up or butterfly) to unbalance Tackett. He immediately transitions to the back, securing a body lock, demonstrating excellent chaining of attacks. Tackett defends the hooks.
detail.outcome: Galvao successfully sweeps Tackett, gains back control with a body lock, and is close to securing hooks for points/submission.
detail.coaching: Galvao's sweep-to-back-take transition is seamless and aggressive. Tackett's defense is crucial here to prevent hooks and choke attempts.

detail.execution: Galvao smoothly transitions from side control to mount, maintaining heavy pressure and control over Tackett's hips and upper body. He immediately starts looking for arm isolation (arm triangle/armbar setup).
detail.outcome: Galvao achieves mount, a highly dominant position, and begins to set up a submission, increasing the immediate threat.
detail.coaching: Galvao's mount transition is clean and dominant. He's patient in the mount, not rushing, but actively hunting for limb isolation.

detail.setup: Galvao was in mount, Tackett initiated a mount escape.
detail.execution: Tackett executes a powerful bridge and shrimp, creating enough space to dislodge Galvao's mount. He then uses dynamic hip movement and leg dexterity to reverse the position, ending up in Galvao's open guard.
detail.outcome: Tackett successfully escapes mount and regains top position in Galvao's guard, neutralizing Galvao's dominant position.
detail.coaching: Another strong mount escape from Tackett. He consistently uses fundamental movements effectively to regain a favorable position.

detail.coaching: Galvao's ability to chain attacks from guard to sweep to back control is high-level. Tackett's defense against the hooks needs to be tighter.

detail.setup: Galvao was in mount, Tackett initiated a mount escape.
detail.execution: Tackett uses a powerful bridge and shrimp to create space and disrupt Galvao's mount. He then leverages his athletic ability and dynamic hip movement to reverse the position, landing in Galvao's open guard.
detail.outcome: Tackett successfully escapes mount and regains the top position in Galvao's guard, preventing further attacks from mount.
detail.coaching: Tackett's repeated mount escapes highlight his defensive prowess and physical conditioning. Maintaining top position is crucial for him now.

detail.setup: Tackett, from bottom mount, used strong frames and hip escapes to create space against Galvao's pressure.
detail.execution: Tackett leveraged Galvao's slight shift in weight during a mount adjustment, initiating a powerful bridge and roll. He maintained head control and used his legs to clear Galvao's hooks, driving through to come up on top. Galvao's quick back defense prevented immediate control.
detail.outcome: Tackett successfully escaped mount and reversed position, landing in Galvao's open guard. This shifted the momentum and put Tackett in a dominant top position.
detail.coaching: Tackett's mount escape was technically sound and well-timed. Galvao needs to be more mindful of base and pressure when adjusting mount to prevent reversals.

detail.outcome: Tackett was unable to pass Galvao's guard, who showed excellent guard retention. The match remained in a neutral guard exchange, with no points scored.
detail.coaching: Tackett's passing attempts were aggressive but lacked the final breakthrough. Galvao's guard retention was exceptional, showcasing high-level flexibility and active defense.

detail.setup: Galvao initiated a dynamic sweep from his open guard, catching Tackett off balance during a passing attempt.

detail.outcome: Galvao successfully swept Tackett and secured a body lock, but Tackett's defense prevented hooks from being established, denying points.
detail.coaching: Galvao's sweep and back take entry were fluid and aggressive. Tackett's defensive posture and hand fighting were crucial in preventing hooks.

Galvao's back defense was active, preventing a full reversal. | Tackett successfully escaped mount and reversed position, landing in Galvao's open guard. This shifted the momentum and put Tackett in a dominant top position. | Tackett's mount escape was technically sound and well-timed. Galvao needs to secure mount better, preventing the initial space creation.

segments.notes: Tackett attempts to pass Galvao's guard, Galvao actively retains.
segments.stage1_raw: **SEG** | [14:30-14:40] | guard | Galvao | 0.7 | - | 0.5 | tackett_passing_attempts,galvao_guard_retention | guard_passing_strategy,flexible_guard | Tackett attempts to pass Galvao's guard, Galvao actively retains.

detail.setup: Tackett established a strong passing posture from Galvao's open guard, controlling legs and hips.
detail.execution: Tackett attempted knee-slice and toreando passes, using head pressure and grip fighting. Galvao employed a flexible, dynamic guard, utilizing deep DLR hooks and hip movement to consistently recover and maintain distance, preventing any significant pass.
detail.outcome: Tackett was unable to pass Galvao's guard, who showed excellent guard retention. The match remained in a neutral guard exchange, with no points scored.
detail.coaching: Tackett's passing attempts were aggressive but lacked the final breakthrough. Galvao's guard retention was exceptional, showcasing high-level flexibility and active defense.
